title: Marco Paul 30cm Acrylic LED Penguin Christmas Decoration Light - Battery Operated Figure with Auto Timer Indoor & Outdoor Xmas Ornament - Home & Garden Festive Lighting Decor
features: Specifications - This Christmas decoration measures a 30cm x 24cm x 14cm and is made from hard wearing and durable Acrylic. Complete with 30 Cool White LED's, this LED Ornament is battery powered and requires 3x AA Batteries (NOT Included ) and has an auto timer of 6 hours on/ 18 hours off. The battery pack is connected to a 30cm extension cable.

Material - Made from hard wearing and durable Acrylic, this light up decoration is weather and water resistant letting it last outdoors all year round. Its detailed seasonal design adds a cosy and whimsical charm, making it the perfect indoor or outdoor ornament for mantelpieces, shelves, porches, and festive garden displays.

Versatile - Designed for versatility, this Christmas penguin light is perfect for indoor living rooms, windowsills, or outdoor garden displays. The weather-resistant battery-operated design ensures durability against winter conditions, making it an ideal festive decoration for any space.

Features - 30 built-in energy-efficient cool white LED lights that emit a festive glow. With a convenient auto timer function, this penguin Christmas ornament lights up every evening automatically, enhancing your holiday decorations with a cosy seasonal sparkle without hassle.

Decor - A fun and festive addition to your holiday collection, this light up penguin Christmas décor suits both traditional and modern themes. Whether used as a standalone piece or part of a larger Xmas display, it brings festive cheer to your seasonal home decorations.
description: Product Description Marco Paul Novelty Acrylic Christmas Penguin Statue Marco Paul presents a novelty Christmas Penguin that is suitable for indoor and outdoor decorations. This penguin light is made from Acrylic material which makes them durable and weatherproof. This penguin Christmas lights features a unique and eye-catching design that is sure to impress your neighbour and guests. This home decor Christmas penguin comes with 30 LED lights that give you a cool white glow when you can use it. FEATURES : Hardwearing, weatherproof and durable acrylic Material 30 Led Lights Needs 3 x AA batteries (not included) Suitable for indoor and outdoor decoration It looks great throughout the day and night Comfortably free-stand statue Marco Paul Large Rat Ornament Marco Paul Christmas Santa Claus Marco Paul Christmas Santa Gonk with White LED Marco Paul Christmas RED Standing Santa Claus Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 32 4.6 out of 5 stars 60 4.7 out of 5 stars 37 4.3 out of 5 stars 266 Price £29.99 £ 29 . 99 — no data — no data £51.99 £ 51 . 99 Dimensions 108 x 30 x 30 cm 60 cm 60 cm 60 cm Free standing Yes Yes Yes Yes LEDs None None White LEDs White LEDs Battery operated No No Yes Yes
